rationale: Issue split from DRIVERS-2623; AWS Lambda FaaS detection logic too permissive, violating spec rules for environment detection.
Config macro leaks in C++ header files; internal ABI/build issue with no contradicted spec rule.
Windows VERSIONINFO resource in binaries; build/packaging best practice, not a spec requirement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2761; spec says not to append read/write concern to Atlas Search Index helper commands; driver did so.
CI task to test compilation with VS 2019; build infrastructure, no spec involvement.
Remove Boost dependency; internal dependency refactor with no driver behavior or spec change.
Restoring VERSION_CURRENT to dist tarball; packaging/release bug, not spec-related.
pkg-config dependency naming bug; build/packaging issue with no spec involvement.
ABI tag generator expression handling for MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY; CMake build issue, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2666; standardizing performance benchmarking infrastructure, not spec test or behavior.
Issue split DRIVERS-2861; Improvement type renaming rangePreview to range per SERVER change; proactive spec rollout, driver was not wrong.
Signing driver release binaries; release/packaging process, no spec involvement.
Coverity static analysis: uninitialized pointer in move constructor; internal undefined behavior fix, no spec rule violated.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2421 Improvement; adding topology description to server selection timeout errors per spec; proactive spec rollout.
API ergonomics improvement for pool::entry; no spec requirement for operator[] on pool entries.
Issue split DRIVERS-2768 Improvement; adding type field for Vector Search GA; proactive feature addition, driver not nonconforming.
API ergonomics improvement: add empty() to bulk_write class; no spec requirement for this method.
Missing <string> include (IWYU violation) exposed by STL update; build/compile issue, no spec involvement.
Upgrade Catch2 test framework to v3; internal test dependency update, not spec test infrastructure.
bsoncxx::to_json discards bson_init_static return value; internal implementation bug, no specific BSON spec rule requires throwing on invalid input.
Unchecked return value when acquiring client from pool; internal implementation bug with no spec rule violated.
Missing __cdecl on exported Windows DLL functions; ABI/build issue specific to Windows calling conventions, not spec-related.
Issue split DRIVERS-2789; converting specification documentation to Markdown format; spec authoring/formatting work.
Issue split DRIVERS-1541; CSFLE spec requires retrying KMS requests on transient errors; driver was missing this behavior.
Issue split DRIVERS-2584; infinite loop in transactions provider on duplicate keys; transactions spec defines correct error handling behavior.
Missing postlude header include leaking config macros; internal ABI/build issue with no spec rule involved.
Remove out-of-place BSONCXX_ENUM macro guard; internal API cleanup, no spec involvement.
Renaming utf8 to string to match BSON spec terminology; API ergonomics/naming alignment, not a behavioral nonconformance.
UBSan: constructor on misaligned address for over-aligned types; internal undefined behavior, no spec rule violated.
Narrowing conversion for b_string length; internal implementation bug, no specific BSON spec rule about integer narrowing.
Issue split DRIVERS-3058; ensuring stability of resumeTokens across versions; spec test update for change streams.
Issue split DRIVERS-2926 Improvement; adding BSON Binary Vector Subtype support; proactive spec feature rollout, driver not nonconforming.
Auto-downloaded C Driver inherits wrong BUILD_VERSION; CMake build/packaging bug, no spec involvement.
CMake cache variable initialization ordering bug with auto-downloaded C Driver; build system issue, no spec involvement.
Static pkgconfig Requires using library names instead of pkgconfig names; build/packaging bug, no spec involvement.
Incorrect DLL export macro on Windows for options::index::storage_engine; ABI/build issue, no spec rule violated.
Adding reset() methods to value types; API ergonomics improvement, no spec requirement for this method.
array::element API consistency with document::element; internal API ergonomics, not a spec behavioral issue.
Missing view API methods on value types; API ergonomics/convenience, no spec requirement for these forwarding methods.
Upgrade clang-tidy warnings to errors in CI; internal tooling/quality improvement, no spec involvement.
insert_many result comparison throws on non-ObjectID _id types; C++ API bug in equality operator, no CRUD spec rule about result comparison behavior.
Adding change_stream::next() API method; ergonomics improvement; Java/Go/PHP mentioned for method naming inspiration, not behavioral divergence.
Missing subscript operator on BSON vector iterators exposed by libc++ 22.1.0; C++ standard compliance bug in internal iterator implementation.
Issue split DRIVERS-3394; clarifying phase description in 'Network timeouts test' spec test; test infrastructure update.
Older mongos returns error code 13390 instead of 59/null; spec-defined fallback logic broke due to undocumented mongos behavior difference.
Cross-driver coordination for SSL certificate validation testing; spec feature rollout tracking ticket in DRIVERS project.
BSON Symbol type deprecated; spec requires serializing symbols as BSON Strings and deserializing BSON Symbols as strings.
GridFS spec says drivers must recover from 'not authorized' on ensureIndex for read-only users; drivers were throwing instead.
GLE exceptions should include full error document with all fields; wire protocol behavior spec requirement for error handling.
